game.title: SQUARED CIRCLE
game.subtitle: Wrestling RPG · Road to the Top

intro.scene1_1: You're walking home through the park on Żeromskiego Street.
intro.scene1_2: Headphones in. Music too loud to hear anything.
intro.scene1_5: Not the music – the music is still playing.
intro.scene1_6: Something else. Something through the music.
intro.scene2_2: Three men. One on the ground.
intro.scene2_3: They're kicking him. Without words. Without emotion. Like work.
intro.scene2_6: Then something in you makes a decision before you do.
intro.scene3_3: They look at you. You look at them.
intro.scene3_4: Nobody moves for a moment that lasts too long.
intro.scene3_5: Then – they run. No words. No rush.
intro.scene3_6: The man on the ground slowly sits up.
intro.scene3_7: Older. Grey-haired. Face carved from stone.
intro.scene3_8: Cut brow. Blood on his tracksuit.
intro.kaz_line1: – Three against one. Could've been worse.
intro.fear_b: Didn't have time to be scared.
intro.fear_react_a_line: – That's better than not being scared. Those who aren't scared are stupid or dead.
intro.fear_react_b_line: – Instinct. That's useful. You can learn to think. You can't learn instinct.
intro.scene4_end1: He turns and walks away. No thank you.
intro.scene4_end2: You stand alone in the park. Music still playing – to nobody.
intro.scene4_end3: You go home. All night you don't know if you'll go.
intro.gym_scene1: Żeromskiego 14. Rusty door in the basement.
intro.gym_scene2: Faded sign: IRON BASEMENT – Wrestling School
intro.gym_scene3: (someone added the missing letter in marker, crookedly)
intro.gym_scene4: Through the door you hear the sounds of falls.
intro.gym_inside1: The inside is bigger than you thought.
intro.gym_inside2: A ring in the center. Old, with stained canvas.
intro.gym_inside3: Photos on the wall – wrestlers, fights, arenas.
intro.gym_inside4: In one – a young man with a championship belt. Familiar face.
intro.kaz_name_ask: – What's your name. And what do you want to be called in the ring.
intro.kaz_class_ask: – And what can you actually do? Because you look like...
intro.class_comment_power: ...a refrigerator. Fine. Powerhouses are useful. But without a brain you're just furniture.
intro.class_comment_high: ...someone about to fall off a roof. Aerialists. Always think flying is enough.
intro.class_comment_tech: ...someone who thinks too much. Technicians. I like technical wrestlers. They rarely die stupid.
intro.class_enter_power: Points at the ring. – Get in. Let's see if this refrigerator can move.
intro.class_enter_high: Points at the ring. – Get in. And don't fall.
intro.class_enter_tech: Points at the ring. – Get in. Show me if thinking helps you.
intro.moves_kaz: – Every wrestler has their style. Three moves they do better than anything else.
intro.moves_kaz2: – And one signature – the one the opponent fears.
intro.moves_kaz3: – A bad wrestler has ten and can't do any of them.
intro.starter_kaz1: Kaz tosses an old bag in front of you.
intro.starter_kaz2: – Here. Don't ask where from. The previous owner doesn't need it anymore.
intro.starter_kaz3: – Pick one. The rest isn't for you.
intro.starter_kaz_note: He leaves before you can respond. First and last time you hear that word from Kaz.
intro.finale1: You put the item in your bag.
intro.finale2: You look at the ring. At the old photo on the wall.
intro.finale3: You want to be there. In that photo. With that belt.
intro.finale4: You don't know yet what it will cost you.

hud.inventory_empty: Bag is empty – go for a walk!

game.walk_desc: Chance to find an item, -5 En
game.chapter2_offer: Kaz sits on the edge of the ring. First time he's not standing.
game.chapter2_kaz1: – I've taught you everything I can teach in a basement.
game.chapter2_kaz2: – There's a federation in Radom. Local, small. But real. You want in?
